{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032317545356C697C242DFC74379A7\"}"},"total":1668},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6810207957947940876","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好，作者在人物刻画上下了功夫，非常细致，整体书籍非常有趣，值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1585625105,"group_id":"6569997999018085383","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6+uDxffDFY716wHewy1zQgdCSo+hAsRBZR9lUwI0gmC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1908374614851000","user_name":"像一个傻逼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1908374614851000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569997999018085383","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越成陶谦长子陶商，此时便宜老爸已死，徐州被刘备所占，没名望没地盘没人马，处处还召人不待见，处境艰难。没关系，我有英魂召唤系统，召唤前朝名将谋士，为我所用。你有吕布天下无敌，我就召个霸王项羽，一较高下。你有诸葛亮多智近妖，我就给你召个张良，比比谁的智谋更胜一筹。人屠白起，飞将军李广，兵圣孙武……各代名将，尽入我麾下。且看无名废材，如何逆天崛起，率千古英魂辗压三国，成就传奇霸业。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/68d970067fc54a812baea4438464ce05","author":"堂燕归来","author_id":"","book_id":"6569997999018085383","book_name":"三国之无限召唤","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3093人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":272,\"name\":\"历史脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272\u0026name=历史脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://ne
